meeting: Post Quantum Transaction Signature #10 - (date not specified)

presentations_overview.highlight: Two demos: Riva Labs (post-quantum multisig via SAFE) and Silence Laboratories (threshold MLDSA MPC)

riva_labs_ephemeral_keys.highlight: Ephemeral Keys Protocol: rotation every tx, next-signer stored on-chain, SPHINCS+ backup, ERC-4337 AA; multi-chain and multisig now supported
SAFE multisig demo on Sepolia: 2-of-3 setup mixing post-quantum (Riva) and ECDSA signers; no SAFE changes required
Protocol targets ERC standardization; team to draft ERC and share with this call series for community comment

silence_labs_mldsa_mpc.highlight: Threshold MLDSA (Dilithium) MPC: 2-of-3 cloud-hosted T-share wallet demo; ~150ms signing; scales to ~10 parties before blow-up
On-chain verification uses ZKnox Dilithium smart contract (EIP-7702 / ERC-4337); signature indistinguishable from single-signer MLDSA on-chain
Protocol adds optional Signer Reveal feature; 3 rounds of off-chain communication required; paper and open-source code pending audit
7702 revert-to-ECDSA attack vector acknowledged; mitigated by EIP-7851 (EOA deactivation) once adopted

gas_and_precompile_discussion.highlight: SHAKE-based MLDSA smart contract costs ~5M+ gas; Keccak variant drops to ~3M; MLDSA precompile estimated at ~6,000 gas — not ruled out for execution layer
Reno (ZKnox): MLDSA is already in TLS; hash-based-only path risks non-compliance with HSMs and Web2 infrastructure; challenges consensus-driven direction

action_items.action: Draft ERC for Ephemeral Keys Protocol; share with call series for community review
action_items.owner: Riva Labs (Antonio Sanso as potential co-author)

action_items.action: Share e-print links for MLDSA-MPC paper and hash-based MPC impossibility result paper

decisions.decision: MLDSA precompile for execution layer is not ruled out; door remains open alongside hash-based approach

targets.target: Riva Labs hash-based MPC working demo — ~1 month
Silence Laboratories MLDSA-MPC academic paper — expected April (to be confirmed)
